title: RMZ Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RMZ Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
